Bobby Ludlam.name: Bobby Ludlam
Bobby Ludlam.credit_note: One of the three best friends at the heart of the documentary, a comedian chasing stage time and a bigger creative dream.

Corey Pellizzi.name: Corey Pellizzi
Corey Pellizzi.credit_note: Directing, filming, and drawn to places of his childhood, creativity and freedom.

Georg Sinn.name: Georg Sinn
Georg Sinn.credit_note: From far away, driving across America and keeping the crew rolling toward the next place to film, perform, and connect with the comedy world. Infrastructure, logistics, IT, development, finance.

Open Mic Odyssey Team.name: Open Mic Odyssey Team
Open Mic Odyssey Team.credit_note: Shapes the documentary point of view and guides the on-the-road narrative structure. Coordinates production, release planning, and how the film reaches audiences.
